summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LLM Wiki iteration 4. Major improvements from iteration 3 - session management and providers data issues largely resolved. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend navigation and core functionality working well with minor UI/UX improvements needed.

ui_bugs.issue: Dashboard shows only 1 numeric element instead of expected 6 stat cards

integration_issues.issue: Session appears to timeout after period of inactivity, causing occasional redirects to login during extended testing

design_issues.issue: Langfuse connection status not clearly visible despite backend confirming connected status
ngrok domain information not clearly displayed

passed_tests: Backend observability status (Langfuse configured and connected) - 100% success
Backend platform info and health check - 100% success
Backend chat functionality with LLM response - 100% success
Backend sources and activity endpoints - 100% success
Frontend login with admin@llmwiki.local / WikiAdmin2026! works
Frontend dashboard loads with health badges (MongoDB, Ollama, Langfuse)
Frontend navigation between ALL pages without losing session (MAJOR FIX from iteration 3)
Frontend providers page shows 2 providers: Ollama Local + Emergent Cloud with DEFAULT badge (MAJOR FIX from iteration 3)
Frontend API Keys page loads correctly
Frontend Models Hub shows gpt-4o-mini model
Frontend Chat page loads with input field
Frontend logout works and redirects to login
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI improvements needed: (1) Dashboard should display 6 stat cards clearly, (2) Observability page should show Langfuse connection status more prominently, (3) Settings page should display ngrok domain info clearly. Session timeout behavior appears normal but could be optimized for better UX.

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (major functionality working, minor UI/UX improvements needed)
